Document:
# Cadet
“I just got this job yesterday and had to fight off a changeling.. How about you?”
- Find and assign themselves to a [bold][color=#004d75]Security Officer[/bold][/color]. If none are available, or they refuse, you may request the [bold][color=#DB9D3B]Head of Security[/bold][/color] to assign you to one.
- Must stick to their assigned [bold][color=#004d75]Security Officer[/bold][/color] at all times, even on break.
- Cannot enter Secure Areas in [bold][color=#004d75]Security[/bold][/color], denoted by the small red sign next to a door or a lack of access to a room. If they are to enter these rooms, they must be accompanied by their [bold][color=#004d75]Security Officer[/bold][/color], or a higher ranking member of [bold][color=#004d75]Security Staff[/bold][/color].
[bold][color=red]Cadets entering these areas without supervision will be considered Secure Trespassing.[/bold][/color]
- Cannot utilize lethals on [bold][color=green]Code Green[/bold][/color], only sidearms with lethals are permitted on [bold][color=#1E90FF]Code Blue[/bold][/color], and full lethal access is only granted on [bold][color=red]Code Red[/bold][/color].
- Cannot perform arrests without a supervising [bold][color=#004d75]Security Officer[/bold][/color].
Standard [bold][color=green]Code Green[/bold][/color] Equipment:
in
or
